name: Poached Chicken Breastts
recipeInstructions:
1 Place the chicken breasts in a baking dish.
2 Remove the skin and bone from each breast, if desired.
3 Cut each breast into 2 parts.
4 Sprinkle lemon juice over the chicken pieces.
5 Dot each piece with butter.
6 Season with salt to taste.
7 Cover the dish closely and bake in a preheated oven for about 15 minutes.
8 Do not overcook. To check for doneness, pierce the thickest part of a breast with a fork; it should easily separate from the bone if there is one.
9 Reserve pan juices for sauce, if desired.
